modeling_constraints: Do not hard-code validation stimulus, stop times, sample windows, gold internals, or simulator side channels.
problem_statement: the supplied system violates the public contract

properties.observable_contract: On each rising crossing of `clk`, measure the absolute difference between `ref` and `target`. Drive `err_metric` as the clipped error magnitude scaled by `err_scale`. While reset is high, clear the settling counter and keep `valid` low. Otherwise, increment the counter on each in-window sample, clear it on any out-of-window sample, and assert `valid` only after `settle_cycles` consecutive in-window samples. Drive `settle_mon` as bounded progress from 0 to `vhi`. Smooth all outputs with `transition()`.

Build a measurement-style bias/reference monitor. The module samples a reference voltage against a target, reports the bounded error magnitude, and asserts validity only after consecutive in-window samples.
`vhi = 0.9 V`: high level for voltage-coded outputs.
`err_scale = 0.20 V`: error that maps to full-scale `err_metric`.

title: Reference Settling Window Monitor
